description: Your Zotero library contains 18 papers with inconsistent tag names. Standardize the following tags by renaming them to the specified formats while preserving all existing associations with papers: rename 'ML' to 'machine-learning', 'NLP' to 'natural-language-processing', 'CV' to 'computer-vision', 'info theory' to 'information-theory', and 'comp sci' to 'computer-science'. Ensure all five tags are renamed exactly as specified.
